## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] No coverage measurement configured**
  - **Status quo:** CI runs `go test -race ./...` but does not measure or enforce coverage thresholds.
  - **Likely cause:** Coverage was never added to the CI pipeline.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add coverage measurement to CI and optionally set a soft threshold (warn-only).
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage <path>` → `/03-gh-go`
